title: KSRTC SWIFT Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Various Driver cum Conductor Posts
description: Kerala State Road Transport Corporation SWIFT (KSRTC SWIFT) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Driver cum Conductor Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the KSRTC SWIFT Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
